title: Google India Search
subtitle: Enhancing local search experience for diverse Indian users.
problem_statement: Despite language options, search results often lack deep local context and personalized relevance for India's diverse regions.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for hyper-local information in diverse Indian regions.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and identifying unmet needs.

pillars.title: Local Identity
pillars.insight: Users seek content reflecting their specific regional culture and context.

pillars.title: Information Access
pillars.insight: Desire for quick, accurate, and locally relevant information.

pillars.title: Language Nuance
pillars.insight: Beyond translation, understanding local dialects and colloquialisms is key.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we deepen local search relevance?
How might users discover hyper-local information easily?
How might we integrate regional cultural nuances?

points.name: Justdial
points.desc: High local business, low content depth.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need local suppliers and market trends quickly.
personas.bio: Runs a local handicraft business. Uses search for business insights, local news, and family needs.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding local events and study groups is hard.
personas.bio: Studies computer science. Uses search for academic research, local events, and social connections.

insights: 'Where can I find a good local tailor?'
'Are these results truly relevant to my city?'

points.action: Integrate verified local business listings and reviews.
Curate regional news and event feeds based on location.
Develop advanced dialect recognition for voice search.
Offer culturally relevant search suggestions and filters.
Provide context-aware translations for local terms.
Personalize results based on user's regional identity.
Highlight trusted local experts and community leaders.
Implement a local content verification system.

pivot.before: Generic global search results often miss specific local nuances.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from broad relevance to deep, hyper-local, and culturally sensitive information delivery.
pivot.after: Contextually rich, personalized local search experience for every Indian user.

stages.actions: Leaves Google for specific local platforms

annotations.title: Local Context Filter
annotations.rationale: Allows users to narrow results to specific localities/districts.

annotations.title: Regional Content Cards
annotations.rationale: Displays curated local news, events, or businesses prominently.

annotations.title: Dialect Voice Input
annotations.rationale: Enhanced voice search for various Indian regional dialects.

data.finding: Clear search bar and language options are visible.
UI elements are consistent with Google's brand identity.
Minimal user input errors due to simple interface.
Offers multiple language options, but lacks deep customization.
